title: gymnosporia acuminata var. microphylla
intro: Gymnosporia acuminata var. microphylla, also known as Dwarf Cussonia or Dwarf Sour Plum, is a shrub or small tree native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Celastraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal activities, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Gymnosporia acuminata var. microphylla include treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal and anti-spasmodic agent. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of Gymnosporia acuminata var. microphylla is made by boiling its leaves or roots in water to create a decoction or tea, which is consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
